research_question: What is the efficacy and safety of second-generation oral antihistamines (cetirizine, loratadine, fexofenadine, desloratadine) compared to each other or to placebo in adults and children with seasonal allergic rhinitis, perennial allergic rhinitis, or urticaria?

timeframe_include.name: Timeframe_Include
ambiguity_flags: low agreement: Any duration of follow-up (1/3 models)
low agreement: Phase IV studies (1/3 models)
low agreement (exclude): Studies with undefined follow-up (1/3 models)
low agreement (exclude): Single-dose studies without follow-up assessment (1/3 models)

comparison.name: Comparison
ambiguity_flags: low agreement: Other second-generation antihistamines (1/3 models)

low agreement (exclude): Historical controls (for efficacy) (1/3 models)
low agreement (exclude): No comparator (for efficacy) (1/3 models)
